creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
=46rom what I see in ftp://exim.inode.at/exim/ChangeLogs/NewStuff-4.73

 - ALT_CONFIG_ROOT_ONLY is now forced to 1, so we don't need
   the respective hunks for 4.73;

 - WITHOUT_D_OPTION is good and I'll include it to the updated
   port for 4.73;


Also, from http://bugs.exim.org/show_bug.cgi?id=3D1044 I can
conclude that setting ALT_CONFIG_PREFIX really allows
other configuration files to be used _and_ root privileges
to be retained.  But there is also TRUSTED_CONFIG_LIST
variable and it creates some uncertainty for me.  I'll dig
up the sources of 4.73 to understand how to proceed.


Other points:

 - "Spamooborona" is spelled correctly ;))


If I had missed something, please, feel free to correct me.
--=20
Eygene Ryabinkin                                        ,,,^..^,,,
[ Life's unfair - but root password helps!           | codelabs.ru ]
[ 82FE 06BC D497 C0DE 49EC  4FF0 16AF 9EAE 8152 ECFB | freebsd.org ]
